mnemonics: STOCHASTIC: Some Times Observations Can Have A Surprising Trend, Indicating Cycles
keyPoints: A stationary time series has constant mean and variance over time
The Dickey-Fuller test checks for unit roots (non-stationarity)
Residuals should be white noise (no autocorrelation) for a good model
commonMistakes: Failing to check for stationarity before model selection
Overlooking residual autocorrelation in the model
Misinterpreting p-values in unit root tests (e.g., Dickey-Fuller)
